styleGuide.bible: ART STYLE (mandatory, identical for every asset): 3D-rendered glossy mobile cartoon, 2.5D, in the polished casual-mobile style of Subway Surfers / Candy Crush. Thick clean dark outline, soft cel-shading, smooth clean gradients, glossy specular highlights, gentle ambient occlusion, rounded volumetric forms, vibrant but harmonious colors. STRICTLY NOT painterly, NOT oil-painting, NOT watercolor, NOT realistic, NOT anime/gacha splash art, NOT concept art. NO busy high-frequency texture, NO gritty grain, NO fine filigree noise, NO sketchy linework. Keep shapes simple, clean and readable.
styleGuide.outline: clean bold silhouettes, high readability at small size
styleGuide.lighting: soft top light, glossy specular highlight, gentle ambient occlusion
styleGuide.camera: clean 2.5D game render, portrait, gameplay reads in the bottom 60%
styleGuide.characterStyle: CHARACTER MUST BE A CHIBI GAME MASCOT: about 2 to 2.5 heads tall, oversized friendly head, small rounded body, big cute expressive eyes, an extremely simple bold silhouette that still reads clearly when shrunk to 64px. Standing/idle front-facing 3/4 view, cheerful and appealing. ABSOLUTELY NOT a realistic 6-8 heads-tall adult, NOT a detailed armored warrior, NOT a side-profile action pose, NOT heavy ornamentation.

backgrounds.prompt: ART STYLE (mandatory, identical for every asset): 3D-rendered glossy mobile cartoon, 2.5D, in the polished casual-mobile style of Subway Surfers / Candy Crush. Thick clean dark outline, soft cel-shading, smooth clean gradients, glossy specular highlights, gentle ambient occlusion, rounded volumetric forms, vibrant but harmonious colors. STRICTLY NOT painterly, NOT oil-painting, NOT watercolor, NOT realistic, NOT anime/gacha splash art, NOT concept art. NO busy high-frequency texture, NO gritty grain, NO fine filigree noise, NO sketchy linework. Keep shapes simple, clean and readable. BACKGROUND look: bright, airy and deliberately LOW-CONTRAST with soft simple depth; keep detail smooth and de-emphasized so foreground gameplay objects pop; large calm readable OPEN SKY area through the center of the frame (the arrow arcs fly there). Vertical PORTRAIT mobile game background, theme "Canopy Dawn" for Jungle Arc Shot: a bright cheerful jungle clearing at dawn seen from the forest floor: giant leafy canopy framing the TOP corners only, soft sunbeams, distant misty jungle hills, colorful tropical flowers along the far edges. IMPORTANT: a simple WOODEN JUNGLE PLATFORM STRIP with rope lashing runs along the very BOTTOM edge of the frame (the hunter stands on it), occupying only the bottom 8-12% of the image. Render at 1080x1920 portrait resolution OR LARGER (2K portrait preferred) — hard minimum; never output below 1080x1920. Layered but SMOOTH parallax depth, no characters, no text, no UI, no border.

sprites.prompt: ART STYLE (mandatory, identical for every asset): 3D-rendered glossy mobile cartoon, 2.5D, in the polished casual-mobile style of Subway Surfers / Candy Crush. Thick clean dark outline, soft cel-shading, smooth clean gradients, glossy specular highlights, gentle ambient occlusion, rounded volumetric forms, vibrant but harmonious colors. STRICTLY NOT painterly, NOT oil-painting, NOT watercolor, NOT realistic, NOT anime/gacha splash art, NOT concept art. NO busy high-frequency texture, NO gritty grain, NO fine filigree noise, NO sketchy linework. Keep shapes simple, clean and readable. CHARACTER MUST BE A CHIBI GAME MASCOT: about 2 to 2.5 heads tall, oversized friendly head, small rounded body, big cute expressive eyes, an extremely simple bold silhouette that still reads clearly when shrunk to 64px. Standing/idle front-facing 3/4 view, cheerful and appealing. ABSOLUTELY NOT a realistic 6-8 heads-tall adult, NOT a detailed armored warrior, NOT a side-profile action pose, NOT heavy ornamentation. A HORIZONTAL SPRITE SHEET at maximum resolution (wide, at least 2048px total): exactly 4 equal-width cells in ONE row, each cell the SAME chibi JUNGLE HUNTER mascot for Jungle Arc Shot — a cheerful explorer boy with a leaf-trimmed safari hat, khaki shorts outfit with a small satchel, holding a bamboo recurve bow, front-facing 3/4 view — in a slightly different ARCHERY SHOOTING pose per cell (frame1 relaxed idle holding bow, frame2 nocking an arrow, frame3 full draw aiming diagonally up, frame4 just-released follow-through). CRITICAL: identical character design, identical colors, identical scale and vertical position in every cell; cells evenly spaced; character centered within each cell. Place the subject on a FLAT SOLID PURE MAGENTA #FF00FF background that fills the entire frame right up to the crisp subject edge. Hard clean edge. NO outer glow, NO drop shadow, NO soft/feathered edge, NO colored fringe, NO haze around the subject.

runtimeAssetFidelity.runtimeStrategy: Phaser base canvas = 1080x1920; browser scales down to device viewport for supersampled final output
runtimeAssetFidelity.safeAreaStrategy: 390x844 base composition is mapped into the centered crop-safe region using SCALE_Y and worldX()
runtimeAssetFidelity.note: Class L pass replaces the previous 390x844+DPR2 backing-store strategy. Runtime coordinates, fonts, physics, player frames, and key target/projectile PNGs are scaled for the native 1080p canvas.
